claim_support.reason: Material claims regarding Revenue YoY growth are contradicted by the numerical evidence provided (Q2 2024 $5.8B to Q2 2025 $8.0B implies ~38% growth, not -7.53% decline). FCF margin claim for Q2 2025 is supported only by a Q1 2025 calculation object.

numerical_accuracy.reason: Revenue YoY growth is stated as -7.53% vs Q2 2024, but the provided numbers ($5.824B to $8.053B) mathematically result in +38.27% growth. FCF margin of 0.47% is attributed to Q2 2025 in text but the cited calculation object is explicitly labeled Q1 2025.

citation_precision.reason: Structured citation IDs are correctly listed and match the evidence blocks provided. The issue lies in the content of the evidence/calc objects contradicting the text, not the citation linking mechanism itself.

temporal_validity.reason: All news sources and financial periods cited are prior to or on the report As-of date (2025-04-02). No post-as-of data usage detected.

consistency.reason: Internal contradiction on Revenue Growth base period: Recent Developments Para 2 states -7.53% is vs Q1 2025 (Sequential), while Financial Analysis Para 1 states -7.53% is vs Q2 2024 (YoY). FCF margin period is inconsistent between text (Q2) and cited calc (Q1).
